## 📅 Sprint Schedule

### Week 1
**Monday - Sprint Planning**
- [ ] Sprint planning meeting (2 hours)
- [ ] BMAD agent assignments confirmed
- [ ] Technical design sessions

**Tuesday-Friday - Development**
- [ ] Daily standups with BMAD structure
- [ ] Feature development begins
- [ ] Code reviews ongoing

### Week 2
**Monday-Wednesday - Development**
- [ ] Feature completion push
- [ ] Testing and QA
- [ ] Documentation updates

**Thursday - Sprint Review Prep**
- [ ] Demo preparation
- [ ] Stakeholder communication
- [ ] Metrics collection

**Friday - Sprint Review & Retrospective**
- [ ] Sprint demo (1 hour)
- [ ] Sprint retrospective (1 hour)
- [ ] Next sprint preparation

## 🎯 Definition of Done

### Feature Level
- [ ] **Functional Requirements**
  - [ ] All user stories completed
  - [ ] Acceptance criteria met
  - [ ] Edge cases handled
  - [ ] Error scenarios tested

- [ ] **Technical Requirements**
  - [ ] Code review approved
  - [ ] Unit tests written (>90% coverage)
  - [ ] Integration tests passing
  - [ ] Performance benchmarks met

- [ ] **Documentation Requirements**
  - [ ] Code documented
  - [ ] API documentation updated
  - [ ] User documentation updated
  - [ ] Architecture documentation updated

- [ ] **Quality Requirements**
  - [ ] Security review passed
  - [ ] Accessibility standards met
  - [ ] Cross-browser testing completed
  - [ ] Mobile responsiveness verified

### Sprint Level
- [ ] **Delivery Requirements**
  - [ ] All committed features delivered
  - [ ] Demo successfully presented
  - [ ] Stakeholder feedback collected
  - [ ] Production deployment ready

- [ ] **Process Requirements**
  - [ ] BMAD workflow followed
  - [ ] Quality gates passed
  - [ ] Metrics collected and analyzed
  - [ ] Retrospective completed

## 📝 Sprint Planning Meeting Agenda

### Part 1: Sprint Goal & Capacity (30 min)
1. **Review previous sprint** (10 min)
   - Velocity analysis
   - Lessons learned
   - Carry-over items

2. **Define sprint goal** (10 min)
   - Business objectives
   - Technical objectives
   - Success criteria

3. **Confirm team capacity** (10 min)
   - Available team members
   - Planned time off
   - Capacity calculations

### Part 2: Backlog Refinement (45 min)
1. **Review prioritized backlog** (15 min)
   - Product Owner priorities
   - Business value assessment
   - Dependencies identification

2. **Story estimation** (20 min)
   - Planning poker
   - Complexity assessment
   - Risk evaluation

3. **BMAD agent assignments** (10 min)
   - Primary agent per story
   - Collaboration requirements
   - Handoff points

### Part 3: Sprint Commitment (30 min)
1. **Select sprint backlog items** (15 min)
   - Capacity vs. commitment
   - Risk assessment
   - Dependency management

2. **Task breakdown** (10 min)
   - Technical tasks identification
   - Effort estimation
   - Assignment planning

3. **Final commitment** (5 min)
   - Team agreement
   - Sprint goal confirmation
   - Next steps

### Part 4: Sprint Setup (15 min)
1. **Tool configuration** (5 min)
   - Jira/Azure DevOps setup
   - Board configuration
   - Automation rules

2. **Communication plan** (5 min)
   - Daily standup schedule
   - Review meetings
   - Stakeholder updates

3. **Risk mitigation** (5 min)
   - Identified risks
   - Mitigation strategies
   - Escalation procedures

## 📋 Daily Standup Template

### BMAD-Enhanced Standup Format

**Duration:** 15 minutes  
**Participants:** All BMAD agents

#### Round 1: Progress Updates (10 min)
Each team member shares:
1. **Yesterday's accomplishments**
   - Completed tasks
   - BMAD deliverables
   - Quality gates passed

2. **Today's plan**
   - Planned tasks
   - BMAD responsibilities
   - Collaboration needs

3. **Blockers & impediments**
   - Technical blockers
   - Process impediments
   - Resource needs

#### Round 2: BMAD Coordination (5 min)
- **Cross-agent dependencies**
- **Quality gate status**
- **Risk updates**
- **Stakeholder communication needs**

### BMAD Metrics Review
- **Velocity:** [Actual vs. Planned]
- **Quality:** [Defect rate, code coverage]
- **Collaboration:** [Cross-agent effectiveness]
- **Stakeholder Satisfaction:** [Feedback scores]

---

**Template Usage:**
1. Copy this template for each sprint
2. Fill in sprint-specific information
3. Customize BMAD agent assignments based on sprint content
4. Use during sprint planning meeting
5. Update throughout sprint as needed
6. Archive completed sprint for historical reference
